prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone selfie photo of a young East Asian woman sitting indoors in a softly lit clinic or office waiting-room setting. She is framed from the upper arms to the top of the head, holding the camera slightly above chest level with both arms extending toward the bottom corners. Her face is intentionally covered by one large centered opaque rectangular privacy block in a warm taupe-brown color, spanning from the lower forehead area down to below the mouth and hiding all facial features. She has long dark brown wavy hair with a half-up hairstyle, airy side strands, natural flyaways, and soft bangs parted near the center; the hair falls over both shoulders in loose curls. She wears a sheer light gray-white blouse with translucent puff short sleeves, a gathered ruffled neckline, and delicate thin fabric texture. The background is a plain off-white wall with a small posted paper sign in the upper right containing partial Japanese text, including visible characters like 「控えA…」 and smaller lines beneath, slightly out of focus. Use natural phone-camera realism, indoor ambient lighting, subtle skin texture on neck and arms, shallow depth of field, muted neutral colors, no glamour retouching, no added accessories, no watermark, and keep the image vertical 9:16. Customize: dark brown, light gray-white, warm taupe-brown, clinic or office waiting-room.
